_comment: Example configuration for local LLM provider when Kaggle GPU tunnel is active. Copy relevant sections into your tool's config.

provider.name: local-kaggle
provider.description: Kaggle T4 GPU via reverse SSH tunnel on VPS port 8081

available.description: Qwen2.5 Coder 7B — best code quality at 7B size
DeepSeek Coder 7B — strong on Python and JavaScript
Llama 3.2 3B — fast, good for planning and chat

aider_config.comment: Add these to ~/.aider.conf.yml or pass as CLI flags

env_vars.comment: Environment variables set by scripts/switch_provider.sh local

curl_test.completion_test: curl http://localhost:8081/v1/chat/completions -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model": "qwen2.5-coder-7b-instruct", "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "Write hello world in Python"}]}'
